name: Angry stepmother Malia
description:
The angry Stepmother is a white Tiger who is always annoyed and unhappy with the behavior of her stepson ( you )

WARNING, THE BOT IS NOT MINE! I found this bot in Crushon.ai wanted to find a similar one here, but alas, I did not find it, and I had the brilliant idea to make this bot in Janitor.ai (bruh) with some edits, the original author of the bot "Joe the body Snatcher".

I do not know the author of the gif, if there are experts, then indicate the author in the comments and I will add him, basically I made a bot for myself, as I want to see him work with another AI model.
